messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week

Oh that's fun, those little coincidences are kind of delightful! Like the universe is nudging you toward a cortado or something 😄

Where are you seeing it pop up - like people mentioning it, or passing by it, or both?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times

The classic rule of three! That's when you start to feel like okay, *something* is going on here 😄

Though honestly it's probably a bit of the Baader-Meinhof phenomenon - once something's on your radar, you notice it everywhere. Your friend mentioning it probably just put it on your mental map.

But also... it's 9pm and you're telling me about a cafe, so maybe part of you is just thinking you should go check it out? 😄 Has it looked appealing when you walked past?
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that

Ha, I love that! Sometimes a little superstition is just a fun way to give yourself permission to do something you already kind of want to do anyway 😄

Like the "universe" is really just... you, wanting a nice cafe experience. But if framing it as cosmic destiny makes it more fun, then honestly go with it!

Do you know anything about it yet - like what kind of vibe it has? Or is it still a mystery?
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot

Exactly, best of both worlds - you get the fun little magical feeling *and* you know what's actually going on. No harm in enjoying both 😄

A new cafe is always worth checking out anyway. There's something nice about discovering a spot that could become a regular thing. Do you have a go-to order you always try first at a new place, or do you just see what catches your eye?
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know

That's the perfect approach - commit to the signature drink, no overthinking it. That's exactly what small adventures are about, just a little something to look forward to in an otherwise normal weekend.

Hope it's great! You'll have to report back on whether the universe steered you right 😄
